name: US enters mild recession 2026 H2
description: Term-spread inversion + softening labor data trigger Bauer-Mertens recession-probability threshold for Q3 2026.
trigger_summary: 10y-3m spread below -50bp for 8 weeks AND nonfarm payrolls below 80k for 3 prints.
narrative_block: Term-structure recession signal has held above 30% for 8 weeks, with payroll deceleration confirming. Historical conditional hit-rate of this configuration is 0.62 since 1985.

name: EU winter energy shock
description: Gas storage shortfall + supply disruption pushes TTF above €85/MWh for sustained period; CPI passthrough hits euro-area HICP in Q4.
trigger_summary: EU gas storage <60% by Oct AND TTF futures curve in contango >€80.

name: China property double-dip
description: Property-investment momentum reverses; cross-province credit-impulse stays negative for 6 months.
trigger_summary: Real estate investment YoY < -8% for 6 prints AND credit impulse negative.

name: Taiwan Strait tensions escalate
description: GDELT geopolitical-event density rises above 95th percentile; ACLED protest-event index in region tracks higher.
trigger_summary: GDELT GoldsteinScale-weighted event volume in CHN-TWN dyad >95th percentile over rolling 30d.
